assertionResults.title: Session expiry during editing shows graceful error

steps.action: Open employee details (Emp 001) from SpreadsheetView and edit Title field
steps.expected: Pending edit is ready to save
steps.observed: Title changed in form to "Engineer 1 Expired Attempt" before save

steps.action: Invalidate browser token and click Save Changes
steps.expected: Save request fails with 401; app handles auth failure gracefully and redirects to login
steps.observed: Redirected to /login immediately; console showed "Request failed with status code 401"; no blank screen

steps.expected: Data remains intact (failed save does not corrupt employee)
steps.observed: Title value remained "Engineer 1" (edit was not persisted)

evidence.consoleErrors: Intentional auth-failure flow produced: "Request failed with status code 401"
evidence.network: Save attempt after token invalidation returned 401 and triggered client auth redirect to /login

assertionResults.title: Large dataset (500+) does not break navigation

steps.action: Bootstrap isolated scenario with 520 employees and navigate all 5 views via sidebar links
steps.observed: All views rendered successfully; measured navigation times (ms): / 2215, /hierarchy 2189, /spreadsheet 2228, /kanban 1478, /compare 1469

steps.action: Check OrgChart node layout at scale

steps.observed: Spreadsheet vertical scroll advanced to row-index 28; Kanban column scrollTop reached 1200 without UI breakage

evidence.network: Observed normal data-loading traffic including GET /api/scenarios/{scenarioId}/employees and SSE org events stream

steps.action: Compute salary+equity totals from SpreadsheetView rowData (520 rows)
steps.expected: Spreadsheet total comp should match BudgetPanel grand total

steps.action: Open Budget panel and read grand total and department spend rows
steps.expected: Budget grand total equals spreadsheet sum; per-department subtotals sum to grand total
steps.observed: Budget grand total = $52,801,100; sum of 8 department subtotals = 52,801,100 (exact match)

evidence.network: Budget panel loaded scenario budget data via GET /api/scenarios/{scenarioId}/budgets; computations matched spreadsheet-derived sums

assertionResults.title: HeadcountSummary matches actual employee count in all views

steps.expected: Baseline N available for cross-view validation

steps.action: Count OrgChart, Hierarchy, Spreadsheet, and Kanban entries for the same dataset
steps.expected: Each view count equals HeadcountSummary N
steps.observed: OrgChart nodes=520; Hierarchy rows=520; Spreadsheet rowData length=520; Kanban cards=520

evidence.network: Counts validated after normal scenario employee fetches; no error responses observed during count checks

frictions.description: Direct URL open to /spreadsheet intermittently landed back on / during this run.
frictions.resolution: Used sidebar navigation links for deterministic cross-view transitions.

frictions.description: At 500+ scale, direct click targeting of OrgChart text nodes could be non-interactable due viewport fit/positioning.
frictions.resolution: Performed the session-expiry edit/save flow through Spreadsheet row selection + detail panel, then re-validated data integrity.

summary: Validated 4 assertions (VAL-CROSS-020/021/022/023): all passed with 520-employee isolated dataset; auth-expiry redirect path behaved gracefully and cross-view/budget/headcount consistency checks matched exactly.
